Container.Name: racearr
Container.Overview:
racearr is the fast lane for your *arr downloads. When a grab is slow to start or crawling, racearr forces extra interactive searches, races several well-seeded alternates for the same movie/episode in parallel, keeps the fastest, and cancels the losers — so your library fills at the speed of your best available source instead of your unluckiest torrent. It is NOT a strike-and-remove cleaner: it adds speed by racing, rather than only removing stalls.
Works with Radarr and Sonarr + qBittorrent (Deluge/Transmission in beta via the *arr queue). Starts in DRY_RUN (observe-only) so you can watch it decide before arming it with DRY_RUN=false. Ships a live dashboard, Prometheus metrics, and optional Discord/ntfy incident notifications.
Point RADARR_URL / SONARR_URL / QBIT_URL at your other containers (use their container names on a shared Docker network, or the Unraid host IP).
Container.Requires: At least one Radarr or Sonarr API key, plus (recommended) qBittorrent WebUI credentials.

Config.Name: WebUI / metrics port
Config.Description: Blazor dashboard, Prometheus /metrics, and /healthz all bind here.

Config.Name: Config (database)
Config.Description: Holds racearr.db (settings + history). Keep it on the array.

Config.Name: RADARR_URL
Config.Description: Base URL of your Radarr (container name on a shared network, or host IP:port).

Config.Name: RADARR_API_KEY
Config.Description: Radarr → Settings → General → API Key. Leave blank if you only run Sonarr.

Config.Name: SONARR_URL
Config.Description: Base URL of your Sonarr (container name on a shared network, or host IP:port).

Config.Name: SONARR_API_KEY
Config.Description: Sonarr → Settings → General → API Key. Leave blank if you only run Radarr.

Config.Name: QBIT_URL
Config.Description: qBittorrent WebUI URL (used to read live per-torrent speed).

Config.Name: DRY_RUN
Config.Description: Observe-only when true (recommended for the first run). Set to false to arm racing + removals.

Config.Name: TORRENT_CLIENT
Config.Description: qbittorrent (full fidelity), or deluge / transmission (beta, read via the *arr queue).

Config.Name: INCIDENT_WEBHOOK_URL
Config.Description: Optional. Discord webhook (auto-detected) or any Slack/Mattermost/generic webhook to receive incident notifications.

Config.Name: NTFY_URL
Config.Description: Optional. ntfy server base URL (e.g. https://ntfy.sh). Requires NTFY_TOPIC.

Config.Name: NTFY_TOPIC
Config.Description: Optional. ntfy topic to publish incidents to.

Config.Name: ARR_INSTANCES
Config.Description: Optional. Extra *arr instances beyond the primary, ; -separated as kind|url|apikey|label (e.g. radarr|http://radarr-4k:7878|KEY|4k).
